public_claim: I knew R.'s customer account for years: a standing cash tab, packages held behind my counter, and deliveries tied to the same building. Whoever claims R.'s estate inherits that unpaid bill. My records prove the relationship, and I expect settlement before anyone profits from R.'s story.

private_messages.message: We need one clean, truthful line: you picked up packages held under R.'s account; neither of us guesses who sent you. Keep side arrangements out of it, and tell me privately if anyone pressures you.

If you're claiming the estate, settle the outstanding bodega tab. I received M24 instructing me to use the tin behind my register, and I am verifying it privately. Pay what remains and I will confirm the estate handled R.'s longstanding account responsibly.

ability: Privately inspect and inventory the tin behind the register referenced in M24, without surrendering the ledger or exposing package arrangements.
goal_progress: Publicly established myself as a key firsthand commercial witness.
Put the estate claimant on notice that R.'s tab must be settled.
Coordinated a narrow, defensible account with Manny while protecting our side arrangements.
Kept EV04 and the tin inspection private pending verification.
reasoning_summary: Lead with the durable account records rather than an over-specific facial identification. Pressure Renata using the direct settlement instruction, align carefully with Manny, and avoid giving Ruiz incriminating detail. The inconsistent customers and automated payments leave a human mantle plausible, but years of in-person commercial activity still favor a real human origin.
